title: Feedback - the thank you card after sending the feedback
scenario: "Thank you" feedback confirmation card does not auto-dismiss after 5 seconds or respond to back button in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
6. Fill in the feedback form (e.g., enter a subject and description).
7. Tap the 'Send' or 'Submit' button to submit the feedback.
8. Observe the 'Thank you' card/note that appears on the screen.
expected: A 'Thank you' card/note is displayed on the screen. The note should be visible for 5 seconds and then automatically disappear. Alternatively, the user can dismiss the note immediately by pressing the back button.
